author: @Jlk-rm1jv
text: You only need to square one corner and then if all the pieces are the same size then it must be square.

text: Your getting better at these compared to last year

replies.text: Thank you! It definitely feels more natural, to be in front of a cam this year for some reason lol! :)

replies.author: @SodiumInteresting
replies.text: @MyNameIsLukey I'm thinking of starting a channel 🤔 but I realise it won't be easy talking to a camera and keeping things upbeat and interesting

author: @RB-bl7vq
text:
Excellent advice, A possible topic could be Life Lessons and apply them to everyday situations.
I've found with a total degree of certainty, things always take longer, are more expensive, are more
difficult than first thought and never worth as much if you come to sell anything.
Only two guarantees in life, death and taxes, anything inbetween is a bonus.
BTW Nora Batty likes your hair today.....

author: @JohnTarbox
text: Just a tip Luke, you need to work on the audio to keep the level consistent throughout the video.

author: @DoubleBob
text: That enthusiasm - even though overexaggerated for the camera - is such a good start in the morning. So much better than watching/reading news during breakfast.
